## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**LASER_JOB_SUMM** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST -> CUSTOMER); INVENTORY_MSTR (PARTNO->PART, PART_LOCN->LOCATION); JOB_HEADER (JOB -> JOB); JOB_OPERATIONS (SEQUENCE -> SEQ); ROUTER_HEADER (DESCR->DESCRIPTION_ROUTER, ROUTER_NO->ROUTER)

**LASER_LABOR_PERF** -> JOB_HEADER (WORK_ORDER->JOB, WO_SUFFIX->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (WO_SEQ -> SEQ); OP_CODES (LMO -> LMO)

**LASER_NC_LABOR** -> OP_CODES (LMO -> LMO); UM_CODES (UM -> CODE)

**LASER_PURCH_REQ** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); JOB_HEADER (WORK_ORDER->JOB, WO_SUFFIX->SUFFIX); JOB_OPERATIONS (WO_SEQ -> SEQ); LOCATIONS (LOCATION -> LOCATION); PO_HEADER (PO_NUMBER -> PURCHASE_ORDER); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR->VENDOR, VENDOR_NAME->NAME_VENDOR, VENDOR_NAME2->NAME_VENDOR)

**LASER_RFQ** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (DESCR->DESCRIPTION, PART->PART); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR->VENDOR, VEN_ADDS_1->ADDRESS1, VEN_ADDS_2->ADDRESS2, VEN_CITY->CITY, VEN_COUNTRY->COUNTRY, VEN_STATE->STATE, VEN_ZIP->CODE_ZIP)

**LASER_RMA** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER)
